dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) Price above weekly pivot point, (2) 20MA showing uptrend (current > previous), (3) Price above 20MA support. Exit condition: Price breaks above R3 resistance. R2 level is used as implicit intermediate target but not as hard exit. Weekly pivot data mapped to pivot/r1/r2/r3 indicators available in engine. AUTHOR_SILENT exit condition converted to reversal signal (break above R3 confirms strong uptrend continuation).

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions: (1) Price above weekly pivot point, (2) 20MA showing uptrend (current > previous), (3) Price above 20MA support. Exit condition: Price breaks above R3 resistance. R2 level is used as implicit intermediate target but not as hard exit. Weekly pivot data mapped to pivot/r1/r2/r3 indicators available in engine. AUTHOR_SILENT exit condition converted to reversal signal (break above R3 confirms strong uptrend continuation).

source_rule_text: Enter a long position when price rises above a weekly pivot point with the 20MA line showing an uptrend, targeting resistance levels R2, R3, and above.
